title: Small Scale Shield
description: Shrinks the shield model for better visibility
body:
## There's a problem.
Have you ever used a shield in Minecraft? Of course you have. Then you must know that you do that or see the world. Until now! This pack changes the view model of the shield so it's way smaller which means that you'll be able to see.
This pack supports lefties too!
Best for PvP!

## Holding a shield:
![Holding a shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e955630df8d556bece9db8009dab22fc1c609adf.png)

## Raising the shield:
![Blocking with the shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03f35329eeae1c6df63b7e55d17c8acfbbbee9f2.png)

## Left handed support:
![Holding the shield in the right hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/999abd905e9bb227638379457434b8928155caf6.png)
